summary: Stage decomp PR touching Ice Mountain and Kongo Jungle ground code. The diff names and implements grIceMt_801F91EC, updates its public header prototype, and implements grKongo_801D8078 as an item-list scan with a squared-distance radius test. The issue report records grIceMt_801F91EC as a 100% new match and grKongo_801D8078 as a 98.43% improvement. The PR body appears stale or mismatched, describing mnname.c and toy.c rather than the changed gr files.

key_files.role: Implemented/named grIceMt_801F91EC, replacing FUN_801f91ec and changing grAnime_801C7A04 final arguments from -20 to 0.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gricemt.c prototype/body hunk for grIceMt_801F91EC

key_files.role: Updated grIceMt_801F91EC declaration from UNK_RET single-argument placeholder to concrete void signature with HSD_GObj*, s16*, ints, and mpLib_Callback.
Implemented grKongo_801D8078 and added it/it_26B1.h include for item helpers.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grkongo.c include and grKongo_801D8078 hunks

what_changed: Replaced the static placeholder FUN_801f91ec with grIceMt_801F91EC in src/melee/gr/gricemt.c.

Removed the decomp placeholder comment for grIceMt_801F91EC and provided a C body that writes seven s16/int values into param_2, calls grAnime_801C7A04 for param_3 and conditionally param_4, then calls mpJointSetCb1.
Changed both grIceMt_801F91EC grAnime_801C7A04 calls' fourth argument from -20 to 0 in the submitted diff.
Updated src/melee/gr/gricemt.h so grIceMt_801F91EC has a concrete void prototype instead of UNK_RET grIceMt_801F91EC(HSD_GObj*).

Implemented grKongo_801D8078 as a traversal of HSD_GObj_Entities->items, filtering item kind 0xDA, reading item position with it_8026B294, and returning the first item whose squared distance from Ground_801C4DA0 position is less than grKg_804D6980->unk28 squared.
Encounter's report recorded one new match for grIceMt_801F91EC and one unmatched-item improvement for grKongo_801D8078.
smart_moves: The grIceMt_801F91EC body and header were kept in sync by replacing the placeholder header declaration with the recovered signature.
The grKongo_801D8078 implementation uses a normal for-loop over the item linked list rather than leaving a placeholder or generated block.
The distance check compares squared distance against r * r, avoiding a square root and matching a common game-code radius-test shape.
The grKongo change adds the item helper include needed by the new helper calls rather than relying on undeclared functions.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a decompiled function's signature is recovered, update the owning header at the same time as the C body instead of leaving UNK_RET or stale parameters.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gricemt.h UNK_RET declaration replaced with concrete prototype

decomp_lessons.lesson: For linked-list item scans in stage code, a straightforward loop over HSD_GObj_Entities->items with helper calls for kind and position can be reviewable matching source when supported by the diff and report.
Do not rely on a PR body alone for function identity; in this slice the body describes mnname.c and toy.c while the title, diff, changed files, and report all point to gricemt/grkongo stage work.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: PR body mentions IsNameUnique and un_80305D00

naming_conventions.name: grIceMt_801F91EC
naming_conventions.convention: Use the stage-prefixed symbol name for the recovered function rather than the placeholder FUN_801f91ec.

naming_conventions.name: grKongo_801D8078
naming_conventions.convention: Keep the address-style stage-prefixed function name where no stronger semantic name is evidenced.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grKongo_801D8078 implemented under existing placeholder comment

naming_conventions.name: gp
naming_conventions.convention: Short local role name for a Ground* obtained from GET_GROUND.

naming_conventions.name: pos, item_pos, cur
naming_conventions.convention: Use concise local names for current stage position, item position, and current item node in a scan.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: grKongo_801D8078 computes dx/dy/dz, squares each component, and compares the sum to r * r.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: dx2 + dy2 + dz2 < r * r

assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: The item search is expressed as for (cur = HSD_GObj_Entities->items; cur != NULL; cur = cur->next).
The recovered grIceMt_801F91EC signature was reflected in gricemt.h, removing UNK_RET for that function.
The grIceMt_801F91EC calls to grAnime_801C7A04 changed the final argument from -20 to 0; the report attributes a 100% match to grIceMt_801F91EC after the PR.
